description: For the elegant woman by night, the Reefresh fragrance for women from reebok is reminiscent of candle-lit dinners, evening gowns and long drives by the sea. This eau de parfum, bottled in a delectable curved powder blue flask with a glass top, has woody tones of citrus, cinnamon and the apple tree flower. Quantity: 100 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
